failure_modes: a follow-on 3-run repeat attempt failed in preflight under restricted execution context with Operation not permitted and was not accepted as bench evidence
conclusion: The bounded STM32 SPI self-check path is live-pass on the unified STM32 capability fixture. Firmware performs SPI loopback internally on PA5/PA6/PA7 and exports SPI-valid status on PA4 for machine-checkable external verification.
does_not_prove: repeat-pass stability on unrestricted bench runs
direct external observation of PA5/PA6/PA7 as proof signals
anchor_impact: Upgrades the STM32 SPI self-check path from design-confirmed to live-pass on the primary STM32 sample-board capability anchor.
notes: PA5/PA6/PA7 are treated as SPI-internal self-check wiring only.
PA4 remains the single external machine-checkable proof line.
PA5->P0.1 remains optional auxiliary observation only.
